MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff; Declaration Of Matthew M. Proudfoot
Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT KIA AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Daniel T. Cox, Esq. of QUILL & ARROW, LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiff.
Sara Rabiee, Esq., of GATES, GONTER, GUY, PROUDFOOT & MUENCH, LLP, (949) 753-0255, for Defendant.

Counsel for Plaintiff and Defendant stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. Counsel and the judge pro tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to execute the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued. At conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Counsel is instructed to submit a proposed order, approved as to form, via email to the judge pro tem at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by 5:00 p.m. today.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff; Declaration Of Matthew M. Proudfoot
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Docs, Set One
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF KARLA GONZALEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Docs, Set One.

Appearances (via Zoom):
Donald E. Mahnke, Esq., of Quill & Arrow LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiff.
Corey M. Tolmasoff, Esq., of Gates, Gonter, Guy, Proudfoot & Muench, (949) 753-0255, for Defendant.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted in part; denied in part. Granted as RFPD Nos. 1-12, 14-15, 18-20, 22, 31. Supplemental responses must confirm that all responsive documents have been, or will be, produced. No qualifications. Any documents withheld on privilege must be placed on a log. Denied as to RFPD Nos. 13, 16, 21, 23-30. The requests are either overbroad or Kia has answered that no responsive documents exist. Supplemental responses and responsive documents to be produced by February 21, 2024.

Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to prepare and submit a proposed order via email to the judge pro tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported (302/JPT)
